citation: Freddie SF Seller/Servicer Guide §4203.4 (overlay diff cell -- Freddie ineligible where Fannie is generally eligible at the same inputs)
comment: Hand-calc: credit_score=625 -> '620-639'; LTV=92 -> '90.01-95'; primary, purchase, 1-unit. Per Freddie published matrix: eligible=false (overlay restriction at low-credit + high-LTV combo). Confirms Freddie != Fannie on at least one cell -- predicate exists separately for citation discipline (RESEARCH §RUL-03 line 810). credit_fee_bps = base 325 + 0 + 0 + 0 = 325.
